# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
    name: [servicePrincipalName]
    properties:
      accountEnabled: true
      appDisplayName: [appDisplayName]
      passwordCredentials:
        - value: [password]
          endDate: [endDate]
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
    name: [guid('/subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6db5-4b37-a41c-bf4d5a350c0b')]/[servicePrincipalName]
    dependsOn:
      - [Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals/[servicePrincipalName]]
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6db5-4b37-a41c-bf4d5a350c0b'
      principalId: [servicePrincipalObjectId]
